fault_hypothesis: The expiry check on line 73 uses a strict inequality `now > effective`, which fails to expire entries when the current time is exactly equal to the expiration time. It should be `now >= effective`.

constraints.intent: The check should correctly handle the boundary case where the current time is exactly the effective expiry time.
The branch that returns the cached value should only be taken if the entry has not yet expired.
The current time should not be exactly equal to the effective expiry time when performing the check.

spec.expr: not (key in entries and now == entries[key][1]) or (__cbfl_result is None)

constraints.intent: If an entry is queried exactly at its expiration time, the result must be None.
